title: alter table my_merge_table drop table t1; crashes mserver5 with Segmentation fault
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE t2 (id INTEGER, value FLOAT CHECK (value >= 0));
DELETE FROM my_merge_table WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM t1);
key_bug_features: alter table drop table causes segmentation fault
